name: Panzerotti Alla Piancentina
recipeInstructions:
1. For the Ricotta Cheese: Combine 2 litres of milk, 1/2 litre of fresh cream, 50 ml of white vinegar, and 20 g of salt in a saucepan. Bring to a boil together until it reaches a bubbling stage, then let cool. Lift the cheese out using a sieve and squeeze all liquid.
2. For the Stuffing: Blend the spinach with ricotta cheese. Beat the egg with salt and nutmeg. Mix both mixtures together.
3. For the Crepes: Combine 100 g of flour, 1 egg, 150 ml of milk, salt, and white pepper in a bowl until well mixed. Cook as a pancake.
4. For Final Baking Stage: Spread the stuffing evenly over the crepe. Roll up into four equal lengths. Place in an ovenproof dish. Top with cream and grated parmesan cheese, then bake until the top is brown.
